title: Automated emails and updates
excerpt: Is it possible to set up an automated email and not have it post a copy of it in the updates? I’ve had a few requests saying that it appears cluttered.

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to set up an automated email and not have it post a copy of it in the updates? I’ve had a few requests saying that it appears cluttered.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @nstephenson! I am afraid not at this time, however this is extremely helpful feedback that I will share internally
